channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Several pot holes near the junction top of Deansway to A10, 27th March
item.description:
These small pot holes are gradually growing bigger and were ignored when the large pot hole was repaired.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Deansway, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big van abandone for the last 3 days blocking access to Icon apartments building. This van is stopping access to emergency vehicles if those were needed. This is a potential hazard, 27th March
item.description:
Big van abandoned for the last 3 days blocking access to Icon apartments building. This van is stopping access to emergency vehicles if those were needed. This is a potential hazard
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cluny Place, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging Bushes, 27th March
item.description:
Bushes overhang pavement too much, needs cutting back to property boundary.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crossmead, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The weed waste bagged should have been taken with the cleaners, 27th March
item.description:
Please can you arrange for the bags to be removed thanks (ASAP)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Mooreland Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging trees including holly, 27th March
item.description:
Overhanging trees including holly taking up much of the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crossmead, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of human/animal waste thrown onto shared terrace of residential building. Located directly next to my private balcony. Present for 4–5 days. Causing hygiene and health concerns., 27th March
item.description:
I’ve reported it to concierge and they are saying that they’re waiting management response. It’s been more than 4 days already.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mast Quay, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 27th March
item.description:
A children’s easel and bin abandoned
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Mayplace Road East, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repair to uneven pavement but hole round tree not filled in and pavement still not ash felted, 27th March
item.description:
This has been like this for at least 2 months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lansdowne Avenue, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive littering, 27th March
item.description:
This is just some of the excessive littering left by the residents here. This is a weekly occurrence and no behaviour change despite continual reports of fly tipping household furniture & waster and garbage

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Springfield, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Commode outside house, 27th March
item.description:
Commode left outside no.5 Ravensworth Road. Health hazard. Please remove.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensworth Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Office furniture items dumped, 27th March
item.description:
Office furniture items dumped by 100 Ewart Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Malham Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole, 27th March
item.description:
Pothole on zebra crossing

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensway, Enfield

item.title: In between 2 Donaldson and Brondesbury Road, 27th March
item.description:
Rubbish left on street and littering

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Human Excrement, 27th March
item.description:
Human Excrement been left by the fence on footpath at the Jct Farm Vale and Southwold Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farm Vale, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found, 27th March
item.description:
A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Paving stone not attached to ground. Flips up if you tread on the edge. Trip Hazard!, 27th March
item.description:
Paving stone not attached to ground. Flips up if you tread on the edge. Trip Hazard! Please fix

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thornton's Alley, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Double Yellow lines faded and people parking, 27th March
item.description:
Immediately to right from front of our drive on 26 Uplands Beckenham BR33NB the vellow lines are rubbed away meaning people are parking and clogging the road ! Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Uplands, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass needs cutting, 27th March
item.description:
The grass verges need cutting , rubbish and dog mess is not being picked up as the grass is to long .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34,36, Valley Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
